overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a player character walking through a desert shantytown. The camera moves past a large red armored vehicle and continues through an open settlement area with makeshift stalls, revealing industrial structures in the background under bright sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path alongside parked armored vehicle

events.description: camera passes the red vehicle, revealing open shantytown area ahead

agents.ego_description: walking forward alongside a large red armored pickup truck, weapon visible in lower right frame

entered.detail: large red armored pickup truck with black trim and covered cargo bed
two-story teal wooden building with yellow trim and red sloped roof
low concrete wall running along the left side of the path
tall industrial structures and power transmission towers in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a third-person view moving alongside a large red armored truck on a dirt path. A distinctive teal and yellow building stands ahead, with industrial towers visible in the hazy background. The camera moves steadily forward, passing the vehicle and revealing more of the desert shantytown environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open shantytown settlement with makeshift market stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through the shantytown toward market stalls and a pedestrian in the distance

notable_agents.action: walking away from camera toward the shantytown stalls and umbrellas

entered.detail: makeshift market stalls with colorful umbrellas and scattered debris
abandoned rusted trailer home with weathered exterior
pile of black tires with yellow rims in the foreground

segments.scene_description: Having passed the red truck, the camera enters an open shantytown area with makeshift stalls and scattered structures. A pedestrian walks ahead toward the market area, while a rusted trailer sits to the left. The teal building now appears on the right as the camera continues forward through the dusty settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dusty path that transitions from a roadside passage into the heart of a desert shantytown. It begins by moving steadily alongside a large red armored truck, with a distinctive teal and yellow building and hazy industrial towers looming in the distance. As the camera passes the vehicle, the narrow path opens up into a settlement area filled with makeshift stalls and scattered structures. The scene then shifts to follow a pedestrian walking toward a market, passing a rusted trailer on the left while the teal building settles to the right. Finally, the camera continues its forward momentum, deeper into the dusty environment of the open settlement.
